description_long: This is a detailed marble sculpture of a seated king, identified as Alfonso el Sabio by the inscription on the base. The figure wears a crown and a long, flowing robe, and is seated on an ornate throne with decorative finials and drapery. In his left hand, he holds a scepter, while his right hand gestures toward an open book resting on his lap, symbolizing wisdom and learning. The throne features intricate carvings and a high back, with tassels and ornamental details. The sculpture is rendered in a realistic style, with careful attention to the folds of the garments and the regal posture of the figure. The overall appearance is stately and monumental, suitable for public display in a prominent urban location.
description: A marble statue of King Alfonso el Sabio seated on an ornate throne, holding a scepter and an open book, with detailed robes and regal features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the king's face, crown, scepter, open book, and the inscription 'ALFONSO EL SABIO' on the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the king, the draped robe, and the side of the throne with its decorative elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the throne, draped fabric, and the structure of the chair, with the king's head and crown visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the king's profile, the scepter, and the open book, as well as the detailed side of the throne.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure of King Alfonso el Sabio
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture appears isolated against a white background.
